channel.title: Microbiome Digest
channel.description: Daily automated digest of microbiome research
channel.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of microbiome research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-18
item.description: MATRIX is a new workflow that directly quantifies both total and metabolically active bacterial cells in microbial populations and communities. | Researchers have mapped the skin microbiome of over 1,000 Chinese individuals across three body sites, four geographic regions, and four ethnic groups. | A new study in *Artificial Cells, Nanomedicine, and Biotechnology* explores how the Qingre Lishi formula may help treat Behçet's disease by targeting gut microbiota-derived metabolites.
item.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
item.itunes:summary: MATRIX is a new workflow that directly quantifies both total and metabolically active bacterial cells in microbial populations and communities. | Researchers have mapped the skin microbiome of over 1,000 Chinese individuals across three body sites, four geographic regions, and four ethnic groups. | A new study in *Artificial Cells, Nanomedicine, and Biotechnology* explores how the Qingre Lishi formula may help treat Behçet's disease by targeting gut microbiota-derived metabolites.
